name: Integrated Circuit Systems, Inc.
description: Integrated Circuit Systems, Inc. (ICS) designs, develops, and markets silicon timing devices for a wide range of applications, including personal computers, communications equipment, and consumer electronics. The company is a leading provider of mixed-signal integrated circuits, particularly clock generation and distribution chips, which are essential for synchronizing electronic systems. ICS was acquired by Integrated Device Technology, Inc. (IDT) in 2005.
